sections: Shipped defaults require a decision session

repo_truth: HCM-0.6 has no approved default. The frozen contract requires focused research into durable project-governance/context artifacts and failure modes, a minimal/standard/full comparison, and an explicit user decision. Current Handbook names and implementation are examples/precedent only. This job supplies external primary-source evidence and cannot approve the result.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only and replay the complete sorted subject manifest and aggregate.
Browse current official documentation, standards, original project repositories, or original author sources; do not rely on search-result snippets or secondary listicles.
Cover multiple artifact-system categories rather than cloning one framework wholesale.
Return direct source URLs and a structured evidence packet through the built-in channel.
non_goals: No repository edits, staging, commits, dispatch creation, global handoff, ledger write, or user task hop.
Do not approve or freeze any shipped kind, default instance, requiredness, filename, or label.
Do not widen into Rust/runtime/schema/CLI/SDK/Tauri/Substrate/dock work or HCM-0.7.
Do not treat current implementation, examples, historical artifacts, or the parent recommendation as decision authority.
tasks: Invoke the required skills in order and report the built-in agent identity/status.
Replay every manifest entry and aggregate fingerprint before research.

Research at least eight current primary sources across constitutional/principles authority, project/architecture context, architecture decision records, work/spec artifacts, environment/deployment truth, risk/quality records, operational docs, and progressive/minimal documentation models.
For each source, record the artifact roles it uses, scope/lifecycle, which content is mandatory versus conditional, and any first-party warnings about staleness, duplication, overhead, or misuse.
Distinguish source fact from inference; keep quotations minimal and paraphrase with direct URLs.
Extract decision principles applicable to Handbook without assuming source terminology should become shipped names.
Propose candidate-neutral building blocks and likely failure modes for a shared-rubric minimal/standard/full comparison. Do not choose or approve a default.
Return the required result fields; use verdict COMPLETE, PARTIAL, or BLOCKED.
contracts_and_gates: Research must be primary-source grounded and current as of 2026-07-16.
Kinds and instances remain distinct; a shipped kind need not be a selected default instance.
Exactly one selected constitutional_root instance must be always required.
PG-DEFAULT-01 remains open until explicit user approval exists.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if the manifest cannot replay or the authority is internally contradictory.
Return to the parent if evidence would require broader product authority or inaccessible sources.
Remain read-only and return partial evidence honestly when a bounded source is unavailable.
